== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year }} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year }} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year }} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year }} ).

[[sn:September 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 10일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初十]] [[zh:九月初十]] [[en:draft:September 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year }} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkū|ja|建久}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|ja|1197th year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|ja|順徳天皇}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|ja|1242nd year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王}} , 5th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} house (+ {{ill|1769|ja|1769th year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1725|ja|1725th year }} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就}} , 8th lord of {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} (+ {{ill|1789|ja|1789th year }} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year }} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Hisashi|ja|木村栄}} , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧}} (+ {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year }} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year }} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year }} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:Emperor Tenmu13rd year 10月13日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|9|9|11|8|10|10|9|0910}}

== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year }} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkū|ja|建久}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|ja|1197th year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|ja|順徳天皇}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|ja|1242nd year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王}} , 5th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} house (+ {{ill|1769|ja|1769th year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1725|ja|1725th year }} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就}} , 8th lord of {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} (+ {{ill|1789|ja|1789th year }} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year }} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Hisashi|ja|木村栄}} , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧}} (+ {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year }} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year }} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year }} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:Emperor Tenmu13rd year 10月13日]]

[[sn:September 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 10일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初十]] [[zh:九月初十]] [[en:draft:September 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . [[sn:September 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 10일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初十]] [[zh:九月初十]] [[en:draft:September 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year }} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkū|ja|建久}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|ja|1197th year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|ja|順徳天皇}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|ja|1242nd year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王}} , 5th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} house (+ {{ill|1769|ja|1769th year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1725|ja|1725th year }} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就}} , 8th lord of {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} (+ {{ill|1789|ja|1789th year }} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year }} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Hisashi|ja|木村栄}} , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧}} (+ {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year }} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year }} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year }} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:Emperor Tenmu13rd year 10月13日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|9|9|11|8|10|10|9|0910}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year }} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year }} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year }} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year }} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:Emperor Tenmu13rd year 10月13日]]

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初十]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year }} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkū|ja|建久}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|ja|1197th year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|ja|順徳天皇}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|ja|1242nd year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year }} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王}} , 5th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} house (+ {{ill|1769|ja|1769th year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1725|ja|1725th year }} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就}} , 8th lord of {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩}} and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain}} (+ {{ill|1789|ja|1789th year }} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year }} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Hisashi|ja|木村栄}} , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧}} (+ {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year }} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year }} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year }} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year }} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year }} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year }} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year }} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year }} ).

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初十]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗|12=draft}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)|12=draft}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮|12=draft}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル|12=draft}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音|12=draft}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い|12=draft}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkū|ja|建久|12=draft}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|ja|1197th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|ja|順徳天皇|12=draft}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|ja|1242nd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=draft}} , 5th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮|12=draft}} house (+ {{ill|1769|ja|1769th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1725|ja|1725th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=draft}} , 8th lord of {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩|12=draft}} and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1789|ja|1789th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Hisashi|ja|木村栄|12=draft}} , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|12=draft}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|12=draft}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|12=draft}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|12=draft}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year|12=draft}} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐|12=draft}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代|12=draft}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁|12=draft}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|12=draft}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来|12=draft}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|12=draft}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|12=draft}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|9|9|11|8|10|10|9|0910}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初十]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗|12=draft|12=draft}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮|12=draft|12=draft}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル|12=draft|12=draft}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音|12=draft|12=draft}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkū|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|ja|1197th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|ja|順徳天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|ja|1242nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , 5th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮|12=draft|12=draft}} house (+ {{ill|1769|ja|1769th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1725|ja|1725th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=draft|12=draft}} , 8th lord of {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩|12=draft|12=draft}} and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1789|ja|1789th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Hisashi|ja|木村栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|12=draft|12=draft}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫|12=draft|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|12=draft|12=draft}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

== Births == * {{ill|Kenkū|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|ja|1197th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|ja|順徳天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|ja|1242nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , 5th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮|12=draft|12=draft}} house (+ {{ill|1769|ja|1769th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1725|ja|1725th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=draft|12=draft}} , 8th lord of {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩|12=draft|12=draft}} and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1789|ja|1789th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Hisashi|ja|木村栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|12=draft|12=draft}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫|12=draft|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|12=draft|12=draft}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初十]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗|12=draft|12=draft}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮|12=draft|12=draft}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル|12=draft|12=draft}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音|12=draft|12=draft}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkū|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|ja|1197th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|ja|順徳天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|ja|1242nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , 5th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮|12=draft|12=draft}} house (+ {{ill|1769|ja|1769th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1725|ja|1725th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=draft|12=draft}} , 8th lord of {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩|12=draft|12=draft}} and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1789|ja|1789th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Hisashi|ja|木村栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|12=draft|12=draft}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫|12=draft|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|12=draft|12=draft}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗|12=draft|12=draft}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮|12=draft|12=draft}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル|12=draft|12=draft}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音|12=draft|12=draft}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkū|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|ja|1197th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|ja|順徳天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|ja|1242nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , 5th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮|12=draft|12=draft}} house (+ {{ill|1769|ja|1769th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1725|ja|1725th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=draft|12=draft}} , 8th lord of {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩|12=draft|12=draft}} and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1789|ja|1789th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Hisashi|ja|木村栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|886|ja|886年|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 7 / {{ill|Bunwa|ja|文和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1352|ja|1352nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1287|ja|1287th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1441|ja|1441st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 25|ja|9月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Akamatsu Mitsusuke|ja|赤松満祐|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Muromachi period|ja|室町時代|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1381|ja|1381st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ?). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Nobushige|ja|武田信繁|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1525|ja|1525th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1645|ja|1645th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Yonezawa Domain|ja|米沢藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1604|ja|1604th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1704|ja|1704th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|12=draft|12=draft}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫|12=draft|12=draft}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651st year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Gregorian {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|12=draft|12=draft}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkū|ja|建久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|ja|1197th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|ja|順徳天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|ja|1242nd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , 5th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} house (+ {{ill|1769|ja|1769th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1725|ja|1725th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , 8th lord of {{ill|Chōfu Domain|ja|長府藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1789|ja|1789th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|1870|ja|1870th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 4|ja|10月4日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Kimura Hisashi|ja|木村栄|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1943|ja|1943rd year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長 (元号)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} 1 (Julian {{ill|927|ja|927th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} {{ill|October 8|ja|10月8日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Shinjaku revision.comment: Bot: fix redirect [[Shikinen Sengu]] → [[Jingū Shikinen Sengū]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|685|ja|685th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/685|qq=}} {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 13|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Grand Shrine|qq=}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|qq=}} . * {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sejong the Great|qq=}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|ja|1446年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1446|qq=}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 9|qq=}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|ja|世宗 (朝鮮王)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sejong the Great|qq=}} of {{ill|Joseon|ja|李氏朝鮮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Joseon|qq=}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|ja|ハングル|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hangul|qq=}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|ja|訓民正音|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hunminjeongeum|qq=}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku|qq=}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1561|qq=}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 18|qq=}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battle of Kawanakajima|ja|川中島の戦い|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Kawanakajima|qq=}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .

8|ja|10月8日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 8|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Mukai Kyorai|ja|向井去来|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukai Kyorai|qq=}} , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku poet|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jitte|qq=}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1651|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku|ja|正徳 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōtoku|qq=}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1714|ja|1714年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1714|qq=}} {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 18|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Takemoto Gidayū|ja|竹本義太夫|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takemoto Gidayū|qq=}} , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gidayū-bushi|qq=}} (* {{ill|1651|ja|1651年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1651|qq=}} ). * 29|ja|10月29日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 29|qq=}} ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokugo Masaharu|qq=}} , 6th lord of {{ill|Honjō Domain|ja|本荘藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honjō Domain|qq=}} (* {{ill|1737|ja|1737年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1737|qq=}} ).

revision.comment: Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|qq=}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|qq=}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|qq=}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|qq=}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince-monk|qq=}} (* [[:en:886|886]] ). * [[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 7 / [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Sadayoshi|qq=}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} (* [[:en:1287|1287]] ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|qq=}} 1 (Julian [[:en:1441|1441]] [[:en:September 25|September 25]] ) – [[:en:Akamatsu Mitsusuke|Akamatsu Mitsusuke]] , [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|qq=}} (* [[:en:1381|1381]] ?). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takeda Nobushige|Takeda Nobushige]] , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} (* [[:en:1525|1525]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|qq=}} , 2nd lord of [[:en:Yonezawa Domain|Yonezawa Domain]] (* [[:en:1604|1604]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – [[:en:Mukai Kyorai|Mukai Kyorai]] , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku poet|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jitte|qq=}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takemoto Gidayū|Takemoto Gidayū]] , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gidayū-bushi|qq=}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 9 (Gregorian [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokugo Masaharu|qq=}} , 6th lord of [[:en:Honjō Domain|Honjō Domain]] (* [[:en:1737|1737]] ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 10|qq=September 10}}<!--hatnote--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|qq=}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|qq=}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|qq=}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|qq=}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince-monk|qq=}} (* [[:en:886|886]] ). * [[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 7 / [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Sadayoshi|qq=}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} (* [[:en:1287|1287]] ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|qq=}} 1 (Julian [[:en:1441|1441]] [[:en:September 25|September 25]] ) – [[:en:Akamatsu Mitsusuke|Akamatsu Mitsusuke]] , [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|qq=}} (* [[:en:1381|1381]] ?). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takeda Nobushige|Takeda Nobushige]] , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} (* [[:en:1525|1525]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|qq=}} , 2nd lord of [[:en:Yonezawa Domain|Yonezawa Domain]] (* [[:en:1604|1604]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – [[:en:Mukai Kyorai|Mukai Kyorai]] , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku poet|qq=}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jitte|qq=}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takemoto Gidayū|Takemoto Gidayū]] , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gidayū-bushi|qq=}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 9 (Gregorian [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokugo Masaharu|qq=}} , 6th lord of [[:en:Honjō Domain|Honjō Domain]] (* [[:en:1737|1737]] ).
== Commemorations ==

== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|qq=}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|qq=}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|qq=}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真寂入道親王}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince-monk|qq=}} (* [[:en:886|886]] ). * [[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 7 / [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Sadayoshi|qq=}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} (* [[:en:1287|1287]] ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 (Julian [[:en:1441|1441]] [[:en:September 25|September 25]] ) – [[:en:Akamatsu Mitsusuke|Akamatsu Mitsusuke]] , [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|qq=}} (* [[:en:1381|1381]] ?). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takeda Nobushige|Takeda Nobushige]] , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} (* [[:en:1525|1525]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|qq=}} , 2nd lord of [[:en:Yonezawa Domain|Yonezawa Domain]] (* [[:en:1604|1604]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – [[:en:Mukai Kyorai|Mukai Kyorai]] , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Jūtetsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jitte|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1714|1714]] == Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|qq=|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|qq=|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|qq=|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真寂入道親王|1=Shinjaku-hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583084}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince-monk|qq=|1=hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11555351}} (* [[:en:886|886]] ). * [[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 7 / [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Sadayoshi|qq=|1=Satake Sadayoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11383481}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1287|1287]] ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 (Julian [[:en:1441|1441]] [[:en:September 25|September 25]] ) – [[:en:Akamatsu Mitsusuke|Akamatsu Mitsusuke]] , [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|qq=|1=shugo daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5368717}} (* [[:en:1381|1381]] ?). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takeda Nobushige|Takeda Nobushige]] , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1525|1525]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|qq=|1=Uesugi Sadakatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514762}} , 2nd lord of [[:en:Yonezawa Domain|Yonezawa Domain]] (* [[:en:1604|1604]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – [[:en:Mukai Kyorai|Mukai Kyorai]] , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku poet|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jitte|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takemoto Gidayū|Takemoto Gidayū]] , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gidayū-bushi|qq=|1=Gidayūbushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5369049}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 9 (Gregorian [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokugo Masaharu|qq=|1=Rokugo Masashige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514224}} , 6th lord of [[:en:Honjō Domain|Honjō Domain]] (* [[:en:1737|1737]] ).
