== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|qq=|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|qq=|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|qq=|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真寂入道親王|1=Shinjaku-hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583084}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince-monk|qq=|1=hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11555351}} (* [[:en:886|886]] ). * [[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 7 / [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Sadayoshi|qq=|1=Satake Sadayoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11383481}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1287|1287]] ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 (Julian [[:en:1441|1441]] [[:en:September 25|September 25]] ) – [[:en:Akamatsu Mitsusuke|Akamatsu Mitsusuke]] , [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|qq=|1=shugo daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5368717}} (* [[:en:1381|1381]] ?). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takeda Nobushige|Takeda Nobushige]] , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1525|1525]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|qq=|1=Uesugi Sadakatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514762}} , 2nd lord of [[:en:Yonezawa Domain|Yonezawa Domain]] (* [[:en:1604|1604]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – [[:en:Mukai Kyorai|Mukai Kyorai]] , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku poet|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jitte|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takemoto Gidayū|Takemoto Gidayū]] , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gidayū-bushi|qq=|1=Gidayūbushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5369049}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 9 (Gregorian [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokugo Masaharu|qq=|1=Rokugo Masashige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514224}} , 6th lord of [[:en:Honjō Domain|Honjō Domain]] (* [[:en:1737|1737]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|qq=|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|qq=|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|qq=|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真寂入道親王|1=Shinjaku-hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583084}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince-monk|qq=|1=hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11555351}} (* [[:en:886|886]] ). * [[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 7 / [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Sadayoshi|qq=|1=Satake Sadayoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11383481}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1287|1287]] ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 (Julian [[:en:1441|1441]] [[:en:September 25|September 25]] ) – [[:en:Akamatsu Mitsusuke|Akamatsu Mitsusuke]] , [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|qq=|1=shugo daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5368717}} (* [[:en:1381|1381]] ?). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takeda Nobushige|Takeda Nobushige]] , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1525|1525]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|qq=|1=Uesugi Sadakatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514762}} , 2nd lord of [[:en:Yonezawa Domain|Yonezawa Domain]] (* [[:en:1604|1604]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – [[:en:Mukai Kyorai|Mukai Kyorai]] , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku poet|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jitte|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takemoto Gidayū|Takemoto Gidayū]] , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gidayū-bushi|qq=|1=Gidayūbushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5369049}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 9 (Gregorian [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:October Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|qq=|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|qq=|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|qq=|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真寂入道親王|1=Shinjaku-hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583084}} , [[:en:Akamatsu Mitsusuke|Akamatsu Mitsusuke]] , [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|qq=|1=shugo daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5368717}} (* [[:en:1381|1381]] ?). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takeda Nobushige|Takeda Nobushige]] , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1525|1525]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|qq=|1=Uesugi Sadakatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514762}} , 2nd lord of [[:en:Yonezawa Domain|Yonezawa Domain]] (* [[:en:1604|1604]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – [[:en:Mukai Kyorai|Mukai Kyorai]] , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takemoto Gidayū|Takemoto Gidayū]] , founder of [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 9 (Gregorian [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:October == Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|qq=|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|qq=|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|qq=|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真寂入道親王|1=Shinjaku-hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583084}} , It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .

== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|qq=|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|qq=|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|qq=|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真寂入道親王|1=Shinjaku-hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583084}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince-monk|1=hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11555351}} (* [[:en:886|886]] ). * [[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 7 / [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Sadayoshi|1=Satake Sadayoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11383481}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1287|1287]] ). * Mitsusuke]] , [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|1=shugo daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5368717}} (* commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1525|1525]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|1=Uesugi Sadakatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514762}} , 2nd lord of [[:en:Yonezawa Domain|Yonezawa Domain]] (* [[:en:1604|1604]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – [[:en:Mukai Kyorai|Mukai Kyorai]] , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jitte|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takemoto Gidayū|Takemoto Gidayū]] , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gidayū-bushi|1=Gidayūbushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5369049}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 9 (Gregorian [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokugo Masaharu|1=Rokugo Masashige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514224}} , 6th lord of [[:en:Honjō Domain|Honjō Domain]] (* == Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).

== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真寂入道親王|1=Shinjaku-hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583084}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince-monk|1=hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11555351}} (* [[:en:886|886]] ). * [[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 7 / [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Sadayoshi|1=Satake Sadayoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11383481}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1287|1287]] ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 (Julian [[:en:1441|1441]] [[:en:September 25|September 25]] ) – [[:en:Akamatsu Mitsusuke|Akamatsu Mitsusuke]] , [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|1=shugo daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5368717}} (* [[:en:1381|1381]] ?). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takeda Nobushige|Takeda Nobushige]] , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1525|1525]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|1=Uesugi Sadakatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514762}} , 2nd lord of [[:en:Yonezawa Domain|Yonezawa Domain]] (* [[:en:1604|1604]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – [[:en:Mukai Kyorai|Mukai Kyorai]] , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jitte|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takemoto Gidayū|Takemoto Gidayū]] , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gidayū-bushi|1=Gidayūbushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5369049}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 9 (Gregorian [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokugo Masaharu|1=Rokugo Masashige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514224}} , 6th lord of [[:en:Honjō Domain|Honjō Domain]] (* [[:en:1737|1737]] ).

== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真寂入道親王|1=Shinjaku-hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583084}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince-monk|1=hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on == Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:685|685]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]] ) – [[:en:Ise Shrine|Ise Grand Shrine]] establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * [[:en:世宗|Sejong the Great]] 28 (Julian [[:en:1446|1446]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – King [[:en:Sejong the Great|Sejong the Great]] of [[:en:Joseon|Joseon]] distributes the explanatory book on [[:en:Hangul|Hangul]] , 『[[:en:Hunminjeongeum|Hunminjeongeum]] 』 (Hangul Day). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – The fiercest battle of the [[:en:Battles of Kawanakajima|Battle of Kawanakajima]] occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkū]] 8 (Julian [[:en:1197|1197]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Emperor Juntoku]] , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ [[:en:1242|1242]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1713|1713]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮職仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yorihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516506}} , 5th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] house (+ [[:en:1769|1769]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]] ) – {{ill|Mōri Shigetaka|ja|毛利重就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Shigetaka|1=Mōri Shigetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11547699}} , 8th lord of [[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] and 8th lord of {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q876267}} (+ [[:en:1789|1789]] ). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]] ) – [[:en:Hisashi Kimura|Kimura Hisashi]] , {{ill|List of Japanese astronomers|ja|日本の天文学者の一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese astronomers|1=List of Japanese astronomers|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505892}} (+ [[:en:1943|1943]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enchō|Enchō]] 1 (Julian [[:en:927|927]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – {{ill|Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja|真寂法親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjaku Hōshinnō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真寂入道親王|1=Shinjaku-hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583084}} , {{ill|Prince-monk|ja|法親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince-monk|1=hosshinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11555351}} (* [[:en:886|886]] ). * [[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 7 / [[:en:Bunna|Bunwa]] 1 (Julian [[:en:1352|1352]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – {{ill|Satake Sadayoshi|ja|佐竹貞義|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Sadayoshi|1=Satake Sadayoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11383481}} , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1287|1287]] ). * {{ill|Kakitsu|ja|Kakitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakitsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 (Julian [[:en:1441|1441]] [[:en:September 25|September 25]] ) – [[:en:Akamatsu Mitsusuke|Akamatsu Mitsusuke]] , [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi period]] {{ill|Shugo Daimyō|ja|守護大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugo Daimyō|1=shugo daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5368717}} (* [[:en:1381|1381]] ?). * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takeda Nobushige|Takeda Nobushige]] , {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1525|1525]] ). * [[:en:Shōhō|Shōhō]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1645|1645]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|ja|上杉定勝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|1=Uesugi Sadakatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514762}} , 2nd lord of [[:en:Yonezawa Domain|Yonezawa Domain]] (* [[:en:1604|1604]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1 (Gregorian [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:October 8|October 8]] ) – [[:en:Mukai Kyorai|Mukai Kyorai]] , {{ill|Haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , one of the {{ill|Shōmon Jitte|ja|Shōmon Jūtetsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmon Jitte|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[:en:Shōtoku (era)|Shōtoku]] 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1714|1714]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]] ) – [[:en:Takemoto Gidayū|Takemoto Gidayū]] , founder of {{ill|Gidayū-bushi|ja|義太夫節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gidayū-bushi|1=Gidayūbushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5369049}} (* [[:en:1651|1651]] ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 9 (Gregorian [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – {{ill|Rokugo Masaharu|ja|六郷政林|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokugo Masaharu|1=Rokugo Masashige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514224}} , 6th lord of [[:en:Honjō Domain|Honjō Domain]] (* [[:en:1737|1737]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|685|en|685|WD=Q33480|lt=685}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ) – {{ill|Ise Shrine|en|Ise Shrine|WD=Q687168|lt=Ise Grand Shrine}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * {{ill|世宗|en|世宗|WD=Q124369479|lt=Sejong the Great}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|en|1446|WD=Q6430|lt=1446}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|en|Sejong the Great|WD=Q37682|lt=Sejong the Great}} of {{ill|Joseon|en|Joseon|WD=Q28179|lt=Joseon}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|en|Hangul|WD=Q8222|lt=Hangul}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|en|Hunminjeongeum|WD=Q18990|lt=Hunminjeongeum}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561}} {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battles of Kawanakajima|en|Battles of Kawanakajima|WD=Q1143044|lt=Battle of Kawanakajima}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|WD=Q1193933|lt=Kenkū}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|en|1197|WD=Q19749|lt=1197}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} ) – {{ill|Emperor {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 13 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|685|en|685|WD=Q33480|lt=685}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}} ) – {{ill|Ise Shrine|en|Ise Shrine|WD=Q687168|lt=Ise Grand Shrine}} establishes the tradition of rebuilding its main sanctuary every 20 years, known as {{ill|Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Jingū Shikinen Sengū|lt=Shikinen Sengu|ja|式年遷宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen Sengu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 遷宮}} . * {{ill|世宗|en|世宗|WD=Q124369479|lt=Sejong the Great}} 28 (Julian {{ill|1446|en|1446|WD=Q6430|lt=1446}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ) – King {{ill|Sejong the Great|en|Sejong the Great|WD=Q37682|lt=Sejong the Great}} of {{ill|Joseon|en|Joseon|WD=Q28179|lt=Joseon}} distributes the explanatory book on {{ill|Hangul|en|Hangul|WD=Q8222|lt=Hangul}} , 『{{ill|Hunminjeongeum|en|Hunminjeongeum|WD=Q18990|lt=Hunminjeongeum}} 』 (Hangul Day). * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561}} {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18}} ) – The fiercest battle of the {{ill|Battles of Kawanakajima|en|Battles of Kawanakajima|WD=Q1143044|lt=Battle of Kawanakajima}} occurs (known as the Battle of Hachimanbara).
== Births == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|WD=Q1193933|lt=Kenkū}} 8 (Julian {{ill|1197|en|1197|WD=Q19749|lt=1197}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|en|Emperor Juntoku|WD=Q357249|lt=Emperor Juntoku}} , 84th Emperor of Japan (+ {{ill|1242|en|1242|WD=Q5437|lt=1242}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|en|Shōtoku (era)|WD=Q1193848|lt=Shōtoku}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1713|en|1713|WD=Q6873|lt=1713}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28}} ) –
